name: maxtac-core
description: Core MaxTAC workflow, workspace, faceted research corpus, security modeling, invariant dictionaries and receipts, ledger, canonical result contracts, thin closure, false-negative review, reporting, phase hygiene, SQLite auditor registry, and goal-bounded subagent orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Core workflow, corpus, models, contracts, false-negative review, ledgers, and auditor orchestration.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC Core coordinates authorized vulnerability research without loading domain-specific source, binary, web, supply-chain, Android, Apple, or Microsoft guidance. It manages the research workspace, faceted research corpus, durable research notes, generated corpus views, security models, invariant dictionaries and receipts, first-order-logic-style assertions, primitive and chain ledgers, canonical result contracts, thin/full closure profiles, false-negative review, phase hygiene, the SQLite auditor registry, goal-bounded auditor/debater prompts, validation, proof, and reporting flow.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC Core to initialize this authorized research workspace.
Use MaxTAC Core to add and orient faceted research corpus notes for this target.
Use MaxTAC Core to create or update a security model and invariant dictionary for this target.
Use MaxTAC Core to run a false-negative review before trusting this broad no-finding conclusion.
Use MaxTAC Core to create a thin closure bundle for this tiny non-reportable target.
Use MaxTAC Core to update findings and plan the next validation step.
Use MaxTAC Core to create a canonical result contract for this review.
